languages.text: {n}Исследователи нехотя повинуются вашему приказу, после чего связь с ними прерывается. Спустя несколько часов на борт возвращается лишь малая горстка выживших. По их словам, после попытки прикоснуться к нечистой технологии чужаков из стен начали бить странные зеленые лучи, испепелившие почти всех, кто принимал участие в вылазке.{/n}

{n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Исследователи нехотя повинуются вашему приказу, после чего связь с ними прерывается. Спустя несколько часов на борт возвращается лишь малая горстка выживших. По их словам, после попытки прикоснуться к нечистой технологии чужаков из стен начали бить странные зеленые лучи, испепелившие почти всех, кто принимал участие в вылазке.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

{n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

{n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

languages.text: {n}研究員たちは渋々あなたの命令に従い、その後、連絡が途絶えた。数時間後、生き残ったわずかな研究員が船に戻ってきた。彼らによると、研究員たちは異星人の不純な技術に触ろうとしたところ、壁から緑色の光が放たれ、探検隊のほとんどが焼死したという。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 研究員たちは渋々あなたの命令に従い、その後、連絡が途絶えた。数時間後、生き残ったわずかな研究員が船に戻ってきた。彼らによると、研究員たちは異星人の不純な技術に触ろうとしたところ、壁から緑色の光が放たれ、探検隊のほとんどが焼死したという。

languages.text: {n}A regañadientes, los investigadores obedecen tu orden y la comunicación se interrumpe. Al cabo de varias horas, unos pocos supervivientes regresan a la nave. Según dicen, al tocar la impura tecnología xenos, unos extraños rayos verdes surgieron de las paredes, incinerando al resto de la expedición.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}A regañadientes, los investigadores obedecen tu orden y la comunicación se interrumpe. Al cabo de varias horas, unos pocos supervivientes regresan a la nave. Según dicen, al tocar la impura tecnología xenos, unos extraños rayos verdes surgieron de las paredes, incinerando al resto de la expedición.{/n}

languages.text: {n}研究人员勉强遵从了你的命令，随后与他们的通讯便中断了。数小时后，仅有寥寥几名幸存者返回舰船。据他们描述，在试图触碰异形的不洁技术后，墙壁中骤然射出诡异绿色光束，几乎焚尽了全体考察成员。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}研究人员勉强遵从了你的命令，随后与他们的通讯便中断了。数小时后，仅有寥寥几名幸存者返回舰船。据他们描述，在试图触碰异形的不洁技术后，墙壁中骤然射出诡异绿色光束，几乎焚尽了全体考察成员。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Als die Forscher deinen Befehl widerwillig befolgen, reißt die Verbindung zu ihnen ab. Stunden später kehren einige wenige Überlebende auf das Schiff zurück. Ihren Berichten zufolge setzten seltsame grünen Strahlen aus den Wänden fast alle Mitglieder der Expedition in Brand, nachdem sie versucht hatten, die unreine Technologie der Xenos zu berühren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Als die Forscher deinen Befehl widerwillig befolgen, reißt die Verbindung zu ihnen ab. Stunden später kehren einige wenige Überlebende auf das Schiff zurück. Ihren Berichten zufolge setzten seltsame grünen Strahlen aus den Wänden fast alle Mitglieder der Expedition in Brand, nachdem sie versucht hatten, die unreine Technologie der Xenos zu berühren.

languages.text: {n}Araştırmacılar, emrine isteksizce itaat ediyor ve ardından onlarla iletişim kesiliyor. Saatler sonra gemiye sadece bir avuç hayatta kalan dönüyor. Anlattıklarına göre zenoların kirli teknolojisine dokunmaya çalıştıktan sonra duvarlardan tuhaf yeşil ışınlar fışkırmaya başlamış ve keşif gezisine katılan hemen herkesi küle çevirmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The researchers grudgingly obey your order, and then communication with them is cut off. Hours later, only a small handful of survivors return to the ship. According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Araştırmacılar, emrine isteksizce itaat ediyor ve ardından onlarla iletişim kesiliyor. Saatler sonra gemiye sadece bir avuç hayatta kalan dönüyor. Anlattıklarına göre zenoların kirli teknolojisine dokunmaya çalıştıktan sonra duvarlardan tuhaf yeşil ışınlar fışkırmaya başlamış ve keşif gezisine katılan hemen herkesi küle çevirmiş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les chercheurs obéissent à contrecœur, puis toute communication avec eux est interrompue. Ils ne sont qu'une poignée de survivants à revenir au vaisseau bien des heures plus tard. À les entendre, entrer en contact avec la technologie impure des xénos a fait jaillir des murs d'étranges rayons verts qui ont incinéré la plupart des membres de l'expédition.{/n}

According to them, after trying to touch the impure technology of the xenos, strange green rays began beaming out of the walls, incinerating almost everyone who took part in the expedition.{/n}
